{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232030357502570852E148418A93"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616016941148390206","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"标记一下[吐][吐][吐][吐][吐][吐]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773244239,"group_id":"7615548070398266430","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1GANEVFh8irbeUrJtm9XYgZ+FzrxSTC/62YyLn9k4hn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3912504928379476","user_name":"读书看万卷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3912504928379476","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7615548070398266430","book_info":{"abstract":"【年代+爽文+复仇+经商】
林卫东魂穿1965年，成为红星轧钢厂的学徒工，一个被满院禽兽欺压至死的孤儿。
开局就被傻柱为六块钱捐款打得奄奄一息，原主含恨而终。
林卫东醒来，看着这群伪善的、贪婪的、暴力的邻居，他笑了。
受气？不可能。
他耗尽最后力气，写下数封举报信，将一大爷易中海的伪善、二大爷刘海中的官迷、三大爷阎埠贵的算计、傻柱的暴力、秦淮茹的吸血……连同轧钢厂杨厂长的腐败问题，条条桩桩，证据确凿，寄往多个核心部门。
随后，他在全院大会上当众发难，引爆一切，最终气绝倒地。
当禽兽们因他死亡而惊慌失措时，上级调查组雷霆而至，封锁全院。
在医院“复活”的林卫东，手握随身空间，在调查组的保护下作为受害人，却趁机金蝉脱壳，消失在京城。
他一路南下，过边境，踏上香江的土地。
凭借着超越时代的认知和随身空间的便利，他从一无所有，一步步建立起自己的商业帝国。
多年后，当年的禽兽们结束了漫长的牢狱生涯，回到破败的四合院，为一口饭发愁时，一位名叫林先生的爱国港商衣锦还乡，来到了四合院门口。
风水轮流转？
不，是我林卫东，回来收尾了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ca14adec583602bc21f0dc6dc3b30285~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"火辣辣的太阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7615548070398266430","book_name":"四合院：举报全院后，润港当大亨","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7615548172990956094","read_count":"28514","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"144738"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"53","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,同人,四合院,穿越,空间,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ca14adec583602bc21f0dc6dc3b30285~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453035&x-signature=aIjVAeaqlGAu0TwrehKsrhX8C%2BA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1732423075508013","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232030357502570852E148418A93"}"},"relate_in
